compiled_state.title: As a user invoking /fix-bug, the agent is directed to use the Skill tool before any other action
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Register a UserPromptSubmit hook in plugin.json that detects /fix-bug or /dso:fix-bug in user messages and injects a directive to invoke the Skill tool before any other action.
**Why**: Agents sometimes skip the Skill tool entirely when the user types /fix-bug, attempting to fix the bug with their own reasoning. This hook injects a reminder at the moment the agent begins processing.
**Scope**:
- IN: Hook registration in plugin.json, dispatcher script, matcher for /fix-bug patterns
- OUT: If spike (story bf19-4327) shows plugin hooks are unreliable, fall back to documenting the hook for client .claude/settings.local.json installation via /dso:project-setup

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a UserPromptSubmit hook fires when the user's message contains /fix-bug or /dso:fix-bug and injects a directive into the agent's context requiring Skill tool invocation
  ← Satisfies: "A UserPromptSubmit hook detects when the user's message contains /fix-bug or /dso:fix-bug and injects a directive"
- When this story is complete, the hook is registered in plugin.json (preferred) or documented for .claude/settings.local.json installation (fallback)
  ← Satisfies: "If plugin-level registration is unreliable, fall back to documenting the hook in project-setup"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Depends on spike results — implementation path may change based on findings
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Task context loaded. Hook exists at plugins/dso/hooks/fix-bug-skill-directive.sh, tests at tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill-directive.sh. Both done definitions confirmed satisfied by spike. Will now assess directive content quality and add content-verification tests.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 6/6: Story complete. Assessment: Both done definitions were already fully satisfied by spike (bf19-4327).

What was verified:
- Hook at plugins/dso/hooks/fix-bug-skill-directive.sh fires on /fix-bug and /dso:fix-bug, exits 0, produces no output for non-matching messages
- Hook registered in plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json under UserPromptSubmit
- Directive text is comprehensive: names skill='fix-bug', says FIRST action, prohibits prior investigation/file reading

What was added (this story):
- 4 new content-verification tests in tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill-directive.sh:
  - test_directive_names_skill_fix_bug: verifies 'fix-bug' appears in output (not just 'Skill')
  - test_directive_says_first_action: verifies 'FIRST' appears in directive
  - test_directive_prohibits_prior_investigation: verifies 'investigation' prohibition is stated
  - test_directive_qualified_command_names_fix_bug: same checks for /dso:fix-bug variant
- All 10 tests (17 assertions) pass: PASSED: 17  FAILED: 0
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Done definitions already satisfied by spike. Added 4 content-verification tests for directive quality (names fix-bug, says FIRST action, prohibits prior investigation).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
